form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 295m. Looks tested.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Class 4 on April 9 over 295m at this track behind Opawa Elvis beaten 6 lengths (17.32). Has clocked a superb 16.92 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Georgie Pie at this track last start over 295m (17.21). Live chance.

form.formComment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by half a length at this track over 295m (16.98) beating Homebush Tink in Class 3 on April 9. Should be prominent.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after his success on January 29 at this track over 295m. Last start was third over 295m in 17.28, behind Opawa Weatherley. Has the ability to be in the finish.

formComments.comment: Nearing another win after his success on January 29 at this track over 295m. Last start was third over 295m in 17.28, behind Opawa Weatherley. Has the ability to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground and raced wide on final turn.

form.formComment: At the last start finished last over 390m at Ascot Park beaten 7 lengths (23.40) behind Mitcham Julian in a Class 3/4 on March 31. Can run home strong so include in combinations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished last over 390m at Ascot Park beaten 7 lengths (23.40) behind Mitcham Julian in a Class 3/4 on March 31. Can run home strong so include in combinations.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.47) at this track in a Class 4, finishing fourth and beaten 11 lengths. Strong record off the draw with three wins and two minors from seven starts. Makes strong appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.47) at this track in a Class 4, finishing fourth and beaten 11 lengths. Strong record off the draw with three wins and two minors from seven starts. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed at big odds over 295m at this track. Had a solo trial (17.34) here over 295m. Will need the right run.
